provenance_defaults.source: self-authored (general clinical pharmacology knowledge; corroborate against AMH/TGA at review). NOT derived from LITFL notes.

records.monitoring: levels + renal function; reduce/avoid in significant impairment; long-term nephrotoxicity + nephrogenic DI
extend dosing interval per eGFR; trough levels; nephrotoxic and ototoxic
dose/interval per eGFR; trough or AUC; nephrotoxic
dose-reduce per eGFR; maintain hydration (crystalline nephropathy)
active metabolite (morphine-6-glucuronide) accumulates; reduce dose/frequency; consider alternative opioid
renally cleared; accumulation prolongs QT (torsades); reduce dose/interval; ECG
accumulation increases proarrhythmia; reduce dose; ECG
largely ineffective as a diuretic at low eGFR; consider loop diuretic
creatinine + potassium after initiation/uptitration; caution in bilateral renal artery stenosis
